channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: A Pixel Watch 5 may have leaked from the most unlikely place yet
item.description: An alleged Pixel Watch 5 surfaced from the ocean with key specs on display, turning a bizarre scuba-diving find into one of Google’s strangest leaks yet.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Close-up of the Google Pixel Watch 4 showing the current mileage, duration, HR, zone, and pace for a run activity.
media:content.media:text: Close-up of the Google Pixel Watch 4 showing the current mileage, duration, HR, zone, and pace for a run activity.
media:content.media:title: Close-up of the Google Pixel Watch 4 showing the current mileage, duration, HR, zone, and pace for a run activity.

item.title: 4 Google Health app customizations I use to make the app truly personal
item.description: The Fitbit app is being overhauled as part of a Google Health rebrand. Longtime users aren't happy with the change, but these tips will help.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Fitbit Air in a Lavender band and the Google Health app settings.
media:content.media:text: The Fitbit Air in a Lavender band and the Google Health app settings.
media:content.media:title: The Fitbit Air in a Lavender band and the Google Health app settings.

item.title: The launch date for Google's 'Home Speaker' might've broken cover
item.description: A retailer's online listing for the Google Home Speaker seemingly revealed its mid-June launch date.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Home Speaker next to a vase and plant
media:content.media:text: Google Home Speaker next to a vase and plant
media:content.media:title: Google Home Speaker next to a vase and plant

item.title: Samsung's portable T9 SSD just scored a rare discount at Amazon — enjoy 1TB of storage for $0.25 per gig
item.description: Storage devices keep getting more expensive, but Amazon is lessening the blow by slashing 13% off the 1TB T9 SSD by Samsung.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Samsung T9 portable SSD
media:content.media:text: Samsung T9 portable SSD
media:content.media:title: Samsung T9 portable SSD

item.title: UGREEN DXP4800 Pro review: This is the best 4-bay NAS you can get in 2026
item.description: The DXP4800 Pro is a mid-cycle refresh of the DXP4800 Plus. It shares the same design and has a similar feature-set, but you get a faster Intel platform, better memory bandwidth, AV1 decode, and faster M.2 storage. Combine all of that, and the DXP4800 Pro becomes the best 4-bay NAS server in 2026.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: UGREEN DXP4800 Pro 4-bay NAS on a side table
media:content.media:text: UGREEN DXP4800 Pro 4-bay NAS on a side table
media:content.media:title: UGREEN DXP4800 Pro 4-bay NAS on a side table

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 leak pits Samsung’s wider foldable against the rumored Ultra
item.description: Leaks confirm Samsung is giving the base Fold 8 a much-needed wider screen, but bizarrely reserving the old, cramped design for the camera-heavy Ultra model.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Taskbar on the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7
media:content.media:text: Taskbar on the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7
media:content.media:title: Taskbar on the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7

item.title: Disney’s Hulu endgame is taking shape, and the standalone app may not survive
item.description: Disney appears to be steering Hulu toward Disney+, creating one app for streaming, live TV, and more — even if it’s not quite ready to admit Hulu’s standalone days may be numbered.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Disney Plus and Hulu icons side by side on a phone screen
media:content.media:text: Disney Plus and Hulu icons side by side on a phone screen
media:content.media:title: Disney Plus and Hulu icons side by side on a phone screen

item.title: I actually don't hate the new Google Health app, but it could still use some work. Here are my highlights after testing the revamped Fitbit app, and how I think Google can improve
item.description: The Fitbit app is now Google Health, and while not everyone is a fan, I actually really like it. Here's why I'm a fan and how I think it can get better
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Google Health app Today tab focus metrics
media:content.media:text: Google Health app Today tab focus metrics
media:content.media:title: Google Health app Today tab focus metrics

item.title: Motorola Razr Fold vs. Razr Ultra 2026: There is one clear winner
item.description: The Razr Fold and Razr Ultra 2026 are intended for very different audiences. Yet, with inevitable price drops during sales these two phones are could cost roughly the same, which means you need to know which is the right one for you.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2026 on a table next to the Razr Fold
media:content.media:text: The Razr Ultra 2026 on a table next to the Razr Fold
media:content.media:title: The Razr Ultra 2026 on a table next to the Razr Fold

item.title: These are the best Motorola Razr Fold screen protectors right now
item.description: The best Motorola Razr Fold screen protectors are limited to a handful of options at the moment, but thankfully, they are versatile and affordable.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Using the Moto Pen Ultra on the Motorola Razr Fold to move photos from Google Photos to Google Messages

media:content.media:title: Using the Moto Pen Ultra on the Motorola Razr Fold to move photos from Google Photos to Google Messages

item.title: Xiaomi might have a 'Privacy Display' on the way that's all software
item.description: Xiaomi is supposedly looking to mirror Samsung's Privacy Display, but how it could go about it is completely different.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: How fast is the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 charging speed?
item.description: With the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8, we can expect a larger battery and faster wired charging, though wireless charging is likely to remain unchanged.
item.author: sharmarajat@zoho.com (Rajat Sharma)
item.dc:creator: Rajat Sharma

item.title: 'When we started our studio, we were building the wrong games.' Millions of Meta Quest owners are playing games like Ug VR every month, and they're redefining VR as we once knew it

item.title: 'X by Xreal' wants everyone in on AR glasses, launches entry-level pair for gamers, movie-lovers
item.description: Xreal debuted an entry-level sub-brand for AR glasses, and its introduction is joined by its first pair of lenses.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: An Xreal sub-brand, X by Xreal (XBX), debuted a new pair of entry-level AR glasses that offer interchangeable lenses, customizable front-frame styles, and thinner lenses for user comfortability.
